title: To Hope
content:
Here's to Hope,
    the child of Care,
    And pretty sister
    of Despair!
    Here's hoping that
    Hope's children shan't
    Take after their Grandma
    or Aunt!
meaning:
"To Hope" is a quintessential example of Oliver Herford's signature style...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
